title: HAIKU Settings
description: Configuration schema for {workspace}/settings.yml files that configure HAIKU Method behavior

gates.description: Quality gates that must pass before advancing

workflow.description: Default workflow to use for new intents

mcp.description: MCP server name for remote memory sync (e.g., 'notion'). Skills will use this server's tools for reading and writing memory in addition to the workspace's memory directory.

type.description: Gate type: 'command' runs an automated check, 'manual' requires human approval, 'criteria' has reviewer validate

command.description: Shell command to run (only for type: command)
